feature.name: Document Intelligence — 8 Auto-Generated Document Types from Meetings

stories.title: Create document type registry with 8 types + generation prompts
acceptance: New file _shared/documents/documentTypeRegistry.ts created
Exports DocumentType enum: proposal, proposal_terms, next_steps, team_brief, discussion_points, scoping_document, ideal_workflow, project_plan
Each type has: key, displayName, description, intentKeywords (for detection), sectionTemplate (array of section names), defaultTone, slackEmoji
Exports getDocumentType(key) and getAllDocumentTypes()
Each type has a generation system prompt template that instructs Haiku what sections to produce
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Extend detect-intents to identify 8 document types from meeting transcripts
acceptance: detect-intents extraction prompt updated to detect 8 document intents (not just send_proposal)
Intent types extended: send_proposal, send_proposal_terms, send_next_steps, send_team_brief, send_discussion_points, send_scoping_doc, send_workflow, send_project_plan
Each detected intent includes: document_type key, confidence, source phrase from transcript
Backward compatible: send_proposal still works as before
Haiku prompt includes examples of each type for accurate detection
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Create generate-document edge function — universal document generator
acceptance: New edge function supabase/functions/generate-document/index.ts
Accepts: document_type, org_id, user_id, deal_id, contact_id, meeting_context (summary, transcript excerpt, next_steps)
Loads document type from registry to get section template + generation prompt
Calls Haiku with the type-specific prompt + meeting context + Brain context (via getBrainContext)
Produces structured sections matching the template (JSONB array)
Stores in proposals table (reuses existing schema — proposals table is generic enough for all doc types) with document_type column
Returns document_id + sections
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Wire document detection into orchestrator + Slack HITL with edit options
acceptance: detect-proposal-intent adapter updated to handle all 8 document types (not just proposals)
Adapter calls generate-document with the detected document_type
proposal-approval adapter updated: Slack DM shows document type name + preview + 3 buttons
Slack buttons: [Approve & Send] [Edit in 60] [Skip] — same HITL flow as proposals
Edit link opens /documents/review/{docId} (or existing /proposals/review/{docId})
CC item created with item_type matching document type (e.g. 'next_steps_draft', 'scoping_doc_draft')
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Add document_type column to proposals table + Brain memory write on send
acceptance: Migration adds document_type TEXT DEFAULT 'proposal' to proposals table
Index on (deal_id, document_type) for fast lookup
After document is approved and sent, write deal_memory_event: event_type=document_sent, event_category=timeline
Memory event includes: document_type, section_count, recipient contact name
Migration is re-runnable
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Wire email delivery after Slack approval — send document to prospect
acceptance: After [Approve & Send] in Slack, resolve contact email from deal/contact context
Generate email body from document sections (executive summary + key points + CTA)
Attach PDF if available (from proposal-render-gotenberg) or inline the document content
Send via email-send-as-rep edge function (sends from rep's connected email)
Update proposals table: sent_at timestamp, recipient_email
Write deal_memory_event: document_sent with delivery confirmation
Post confirmation to daily Slack thread: '{Document type} sent to {contact} at {email}'
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Add document generation to copilot — user can request any document type on demand
acceptance: Copilot detects document generation requests: 'write a proposal for Microquant', 'create next steps for the Amondo deal', 'draft a scoping document'
Maps request to document_type from registry
Calls generate-document edge function with deal/contact context from conversation
Returns structured response panel showing document sections with [Send to Contact] [Edit] [Copy] buttons
Brain context injected into generation (via getBrainContext) for personalization
Typecheck passes

stories.title: Build document preview component for CC detail panel + copilot response
acceptance: New component src/components/documents/DocumentPreview.tsx
Renders document sections in a clean preview: cover/header, then each section with title + content
Document type badge at top (Proposal, Next Steps, Scoping Doc, etc.) with type-specific icon and color
Action buttons: [Send to Contact] [Edit] [Download PDF] [Copy to Clipboard]
Integrated into CCDetailPanel for document-type CC items
Also usable as copilot response panel for document generation
Responsive and matches existing design system
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser on localhost:5175

parallelGroups.reason: Wiring: orchestrator + Slack HITL + email delivery
Copilot + UI: on-demand generation + preview component

proposal.description: Full commercial proposal with pricing, timeline, and terms

proposal_terms.description: Proposal with appended legal/commercial terms and conditions

next_steps.description: Action items and follow-up plan from the meeting

team_brief.description: Internal brief for the team about the deal/prospect

discussion_points.description: Structured agenda and talking points for the next call

scoping_document.description: Technical scope definition with requirements and deliverables

ideal_workflow.description: Process map showing the ideal workflow for the prospect

project_plan.description: Detailed project plan with milestones, phases, and resource allocation
